top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Set to Drop on Iran Clashes, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were poised for losses on Thursday as renewed clashes between the US and Iran added strain to a fragile ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan says Japan and Philippines must respect its rights in maritime border talks
top_signals.summary: Taiwan's foreign ministry said it calls on Japan and the Philippines to fully consider ‌Taiwan's rights and interests and engage in talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
